content:
So while practicing i encountered 2 tasks, which made my brain cells dead Nene's Magical Matrix (WA's only) and Cells Arrangement(I wasn't able to even start with this one).The problem I faced is their official solution were a lot easier, but i couldn't arrive at it even with alot of time spent on them.So i request you to share your valuable opinion on how to improve at these type of problems


    


        
            
        

        
            
                
    constructive algorithms,
                
                
    need help
